sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105140" key="triplekh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-πλεκής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n105140.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thrice-plaited, threefold,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τ. εἶναι ἡμῶν τὸ σῶμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">three-dimensional</tr_>(?), <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σχῆμα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg019:5:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Theol.Plat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.37</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
